headline: RTX Australia Jammer Deal Highlights Electronic Warfare Role And Valuation Debate
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE:RTX) business, delivered the first Next Generation Jammer pods to the Royal Australian Air Force. The delivery marks the start of international fielding of this electronic warfare technology in partnership with the U.S. Navy and Australia. RTX is providing on site support in Australia as part of the rollout of these pods. For RTX, the NGJ delivery to Australia sits at the intersection of defense electronics, software, and long cycle military programs. Electronic...

headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.
